claim_boundary: Professional Phase 5 audits and closes the professional readiness package only. It is not legal advice, financial advice, tax advice, valuation advice, compliance certification, commercial validation, or a professional opinion.
safe_overall_claim: SpecShift has a professional-review-ready internal package that organizes artifact provenance, conservative viability claims, financial/contract trigger thresholds, and an exportable review packet index. This is preparation for lawyer/CPA review only.
